_meta.note: Paraphrased Dragon Heir Birthright examples (Hoard, Lair, Flight tones). Merged into birthrights.json at bundle load. Each row lists `chargenLines`: ["dragonHeir"] so the Dragon wizard can surface them without loading the full Pandora’s Box catalog.
_meta.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf — Birthrights, Hoard, Lair, Flight chapters (pp. 42–93, 112, 128)

drag_br_hoard_keepsake.name: Hoard-keepsake coin (Relic)
drag_br_hoard_keepsake.description: A counted piece of your hoard—warm metal that remembers every hand that tried to steal it.
drag_br_hoard_keepsake.mechanicalEffects: Treat as a low-dot Relic; Enhancement when fiction ties a roll to protecting, flaunting, or auditing the hoard.

drag_br_lair_shrine.name: Claimed-lair shrine circle (Cult)
drag_br_lair_shrine.description: Wards, offerings, and locals who treat your sanctuary as holy ground—even if the law calls it trespassing.
drag_br_lair_shrine.mechanicalEffects: Cult Reach and rites per Pandora’s Box; strongest scenes inside or bordering your lair fiction.

drag_br_midrealm_key.name: Midrealm passage key (Relic)
drag_br_midrealm_key.description: Bone, glass, or circuit-lattice that stabilizes doors to pocket-space or Terra Incognita tied to your Flight.
drag_br_midrealm_key.mechanicalEffects: Relic access stunts for travel or sanctuary scenes; confirm costs with Dragon Lair rules.

drag_br_serpent_fang.name: Fang of an ancient line (Relic)
drag_br_serpent_fang.description: A Serpent-flight talon or ritual blade passed through cells that speak for the wild.
drag_br_serpent_fang.mechanicalEffects: Weapon Relic; toxic or lasting harm tilt per Tags — price Boons with your SG.
drag_br_serpent_fang.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf, Serpent common Birthrights (Fang of an Ancient, paraphrase)

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Green venom sheen, oath to biomes

drag_br_draq_agitator_cell.name: Street agitator cell (Follower)
drag_br_draq_agitator_cell.description: Hackers, artists, and muscle who answer your draconic goals before any pantheon’s PR team.
drag_br_draq_agitator_cell.mechanicalEffects: Follower dots per Pandora’s Box; good for Subterfuge, Presence, and riot-cover scenes.
drag_br_draq_agitator_cell.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf, Draq / Black Hats pawn tone (paraphrase)

drag_br_memory_guide.name: Echo in the hoard-mind (Guide)
drag_br_memory_guide.description: An older Heir’s shade, archive-sprite, or cunning wyrm-voice that corrects your mistakes—at a price.
drag_br_memory_guide.mechanicalEffects: Guide Enhancement to Occult, Integrity, or Lore when Memory or draconic history is central.

drag_br_crypt_guardian.name: Crypt guardian beast (Creature)
drag_br_crypt_guardian.description: A scaled watchdog, spirit-serpent, or drone-swarm that patrols your lair’s thresholds.
drag_br_crypt_guardian.mechanicalEffects: Creature Health and Flairs per Pandora’s Box; favors Defense and intimidation in lair scenes.
